data.title: Buenaventura Announces First Quarter 2026 Results for Production and Volume Sold per Metal
data.description: Peru's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (Buenaventura), has released its 1st quarter 2026 results. The production and volume sold figures are as follows: Gold ounces produced in the first quarter were 4,236 ounces at El Brocal, surpassing the company's 1st quarter 2026 guidance of 15,000 to 17,000 ounces. Orcopampa produced 14,992 ounces, exceeding the forecasted 42,000 to 47,000 ounces. Tambomayo produced 2,964 ounces against the estimated 5,000 to 6,000 ounces. Julcani produced 2,464 ounces, in line with the projections. The company's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (BVN) and the Lima Stock Exchange (BUE.LM).

data.title: Robert Half Announces Schedule for First-Quarter Earnings Results and Conference Call
data.description: In Menlo Park, California, on April 16, 2026, Robert Half Inc. (NYSE: RHI) revealed plans to unveil its first-quarter 2026 financial outcomes on Thursday, April 23, 2026, around 4:05 p.m. Eastern Time. Following this release, the Company is scheduled to conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: Oportun Appoints Doug Bland as Chief Executive Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth and Profitability
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in San Mateo, California, Oportun Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: OPRT) revealed the selection of Doug Bland as the new Chief Executive Officer and Board member. This decision, made after an extensive search, is set to be officially implemented on April 20, 2026. Oportun, a financially-driven services entity, celebrates this appointment as a strategic move for its future progress.

data.title: Mineros S.A. Updates Market on Special Meeting of Shareholders Scheduled for April 30, 2026, and Confirms Successful Closing of Previously Announced Transaction
data.description: In Medellín, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA, OTCQX: MNSAF, BVC: MINEROS) shared an update on the upcoming Special Meeting of Shareholders set for April 30, 2026. The Company has successfully concluded a transaction as well. They are currently assessing a possible corporate re-domiciliation or related reorganization. The Board of Directors and management are actively involved in this strategic evaluation process.

data.title: How Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Buys Could Fuel A Supply Squeeze
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) is potentially facing a supply shortage due to increasing institutional accumulation and diminishing available supply in the market. Analysts highlight Michael Saylor and his firm (MSTR) as key players in this trend. Saylor's consistent capital raising and investment in Bitcoin create a continuous and prominent demand, labeled as "structural demand," which reduces circulating supply and boosts investor optimism. Alongside Saylor, other institutional investors are also jumping in, with major firms like BlackRock participating. This growing institutional interest suggests a tightening supply scenario for BTC, driving up its value.

data.title: InvenTrust Properties Corp. Enters into a Private Placement Offering of $250 Million Senior Unsecured Notes
data.description: In Downers Grove, Illinois, InvenTrust Properties Corp. (NYSE: IVT) has finalized a note purchase agreement for a private placement of $250 million in senior unsecured notes. This agreement includes $50 million in 5.09% Series A senior notes maturing on June 29, 2029, $100 million in 5.32% Series B senior notes maturing on June 29, 2031, and $100 million in 5.60% Series C senior notes maturing on June 29, 2033.

data.title: USA Compression Partners Announces First-Quarter 2026 Distribution; First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Scheduled for May 5
data.description: In Dallas, USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) declared a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit ($2.10 annually) for Q1 2026. The payout is set for May 8, 2026, for unitholders on record by April 27, 2026. Furthermore, USA Compression will unveil its Q1 2026 earnings before the U.S. financial markets open on Tues.

data.title: Eversource Energy Schedules First Quarter Earnings Call
data.description: Eversource Energy, based in Hartford, Conn., and Boston, will hold an earnings conference call for Q1 of 2026 on May 7, 2026, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time. This call, aimed at financial analysts and investors, will cover the company's financial results and business developments. The live webcast and recording of the call will be available on Eversource's Investors page. Interested parties can also join the Q&A session by phone.

data.description: Stark's departure from the Ethereum Foundation stands out as a prominent exit from the organization following a significant reorganization in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: Aviation Capital Group Appoints Rob Downes to New Role as Chief OEM Officer
data.description: Earlier today in Newport Beach, California, Aviation Capital Group LLC (ACG) introduced Rob Downes as the inaugural Chief OEM Officer. ACG, a renowned full-service aircraft asset manager, made this announcement as part of its ongoing commitment to enhancing its executive team. Downes will be responsible for strengthening ACG's ties with Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) in their strategic operations. This strategic move underscores ACG's stature as a premier global lessor in the aviation industry.

data.title: Euronet Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
data.description: Leawood, Kansas-based Euronet (NASDAQ: EEFT), a prominent player in payments processing and cross-border transactions worldwide, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial outcomes before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Alongside this announcement, the company slated a conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the performance details further.

data.title: Rowan University announces $10M gift to create School of Financial Planning
data.description: Glassboro, New Jersey - On April 16, 2026, Rowan University revealed a significant development with a $10 million pledge from Edelman Financial Engines. This contribution aims to create the School of Financial Planning in response to the growing scarcity of skilled financial planners across the country.

data.title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES TO DISCUSS FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS ON APRIL 23, 2026
data.description: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has scheduled a live webcast to present its first quarter 2026 financial results. The event will take place on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Bob Jordan, the President and Chief Executive Officer, will be leading the presentation. Stay tuned for important updates regarding the company's performance.

data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Toronto, Consolidated Lithium Metals sadly announced the death of their esteemed colleague, founder, and friend, Rene Bharti.

data.title: Reflecting on childhood memories with Heelys, the wheel-equipped sneakers that were popular in the 2000s, I rediscovered their momentum.
data.description: Heelys, the popular wheeled sneakers from the 2000s, played a significant role in fostering my initial social connections. Inspired by nostalgia, I have chosen to rekindle that sense of happiness by utilizing them once more.

data.title: 5WPR Releases Inaugural Gaming Trust Index, Exposing a $3.9 billion Spend Misallocation Across the U.S. Gambling and Gaming Market
data.description: A recent study conducted annually revealed that the industry allocates 16 times more money towards TV advertising compared to PR and earned media. Surprisingly, responsible gambling programs receive less than one-eighth of the budget that goes into celebrity endorsement deals. This information surfaced in New York on April 16, 2026, by 5WPR, a prominent independent public relations company.
